title: Component architecture: folder-per-component + UI primitives
spec: User request 2026-06-10: stop repeating raw div/span/button markup by extracting UI primitives, and co-locate every component's files (impl, types, tests, stories, skeleton) in a folder per component. AGENTS.md layer rules apply throughout.
notes: Phases are sequential by design: the primitives (phase-2) should be born inside the folder structure (phase-1), not migrated twice.

Inventory at planning time: 7 raw <button>s across 5 files; 4 duplicated pill spans; 8 card containers; 4 repeats of the muted-text class; the Live/Periodic-sync badge is copy-pasted verbatim in both views; Skeleton.tsx holds 4 components in one file.

phases.title: Folder-per-component migration
phases.goal: Each component owns a folder with all its related files (impl, test, stories, co-located skeleton) plus an index.ts barrel so existing '@/components/X' imports keep resolving unchanged.

tasks.description: git mv the 6 component groups into folders (BalanceCellCard, DecisionPanel, ProvenanceBadge, ReconciliationToaster, RequestForm, RequestTimeline), each with index.ts re-exporting the public API.
tasks.verification: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint (imports resolve via folder index)

tasks.description: Dissolve Skeleton.tsx: base Skeleton primitive moves to its own folder; BalanceCellSkeleton, DecisionPanelSkeleton and RequestFormSkeleton move INTO their owning component's folder (exported from its index).
Extract the private Toast from ReconciliationToaster into its own file inside the same folder; fix all internal relative imports.
tasks.verification: pnpm test && pnpm test:storybook && pnpm test:e2e (full gate — structure-only change must be behavior-neutral)

acceptance: No import outside src/components changed its specifier
Every component folder contains impl + index, and its test/stories/skeleton when they exist
Chromatic reports zero visual changes (pure restructure)

phases.title: UI primitives replace raw markup
phases.goal: Repeated div/span/button patterns become typed primitives under src/components/ui/ (folder-per-primitive, with stories as design-system docs): Button, Chip, Card, FormField, MutedText, ViewSection — plus a shared SyncModeBadge replacing the badge duplicated across both views.

tasks.description: TDD the primitives: Button (primary/success/danger/ghost variants, disabled), Chip (tone map), Card (as div/li), FormField (label wiring via htmlFor), MutedText, ViewSection (section + aria-label + heading). Stories per primitive document the variant matrix.
Extract SyncModeBadge (the Live/Periodic-sync pill duplicated verbatim in EmployeeView and ManagerView) built on Chip.
tasks.verification: pnpm test:e2e (the '● Live' assertions must keep passing)

tasks.description: Refactor consumers to the primitives: RequestForm, RequestTimeline, DecisionPanel, ProvenanceBadge (Chip), ReconciliationToaster, both views, landing page links. Class strings preserved so visuals stay pixel-identical.
tasks.verification: pnpm test && pnpm test:storybook && pnpm test:e2e; Chromatic diff reviewed (expected: zero or intentional-only)

acceptance: No duplicated pill/card/muted-text class strings outside the primitives
All 151 existing tests stay green without weakening any assertion
